code:
data TokenBucket
  mut tokens: Int
end

fn allow(_ bucket: TokenBucket) -> Bool
  if bucket.tokens >= 1
    mut b = bucket
    b.tokens = b.tokens - 1
    true
  else
    false
  end
end

fn print_result(_ allowed: Bool) -> Unit
  if allowed
    print("ALLOW")
  else
    print("DENY")
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let bucket = TokenBucket(tokens: 3)
  print_result(allow(bucket))
  print_result(allow(bucket))
  print_result(allow(bucket))
  print_result(allow(bucket))
  print_result(allow(bucket))
end
